svg.title: Earthquake pipeline system design
svg.desc: End-to-end data flow from USGS API through fetcher, transformer, and storage layers into SQLite, with logging running across all stages.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the USGS Earthquake API and how pagination works')
sendPrompt('Explain how the fetcher handles pagination and retries')
sendPrompt('How does Pydantic validation work in the models layer?')
sendPrompt('How does the transform layer calculate magnitude buckets?')
sendPrompt('Explain the SQLite storage schema for raw events and daily aggregates')
sendPrompt('What columns are in the raw_events table?')
sendPrompt('What columns are in the daily_aggregates table?')
sendPrompt('Explain the logging strategy: file handler vs console handler')
sendPrompt('How does run.py wire together the pipeline?')
